content: Select the default {{aiProvider}} and model for all features across {{productName}} ({{aiAgents}}, document editors, etc.)

comment.text: This text explains the purpose of setting a default AI provider and model for all features within the product. It appears as a description on the AI settings page, guiding users to configure the default AI experience. Translators should ensure the phrasing accurately reflects the concept of a default selection for various AI-powered features.
